options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: alliance
options.description: Which alliance your character belongs to.

options.name: goal
options.description:
What is required to complete the game.
Main Quest: Complete the base game's main questline (God of Schemes).
Final Zone Quest: Complete the final quest in the goal zone.
Dungeon Delver: Complete all delves included in your game

options.name: zone_count
options.description:
Number of zones to include in the randomizer.
Set to 0 to include all available zones.
The generator will ensure connectivity from your starting zone to the goal.
(Note at least 4 are required for main quest goal)

options.name: included_zones
options.description:
Zones to include in the randomizer pool.
Leave empty to include all zones.
Coldharbour is automatically included when required by your goal.
Valid zones: Stros M'kai, Betnikh, Glenumbra, Stormhaven, Rivenspire, Bangkorai,
Alik'r Desert, Khenarthi's Roost, Auridon, Grahtwood, Greenshade, Malabal Tor,
Reaper's March, Bleakrock Isle, Bal Foyen, Stonefalls, Deshaan, Shadowfen,
Eastmarch, The Rift, Craglorn, Coldharbour

options.name: goal_zone
options.description:
Which zone's final quest is the goal (only used when Goal is set to Final Zone Quest).
Any: The generator will pick a zone from your included zones.
Or select a specific zone.

options.name: main_quests_enabled
options.description: Enable or disable checks for completing main quests

options.name: zone_quests_enabled
options.description: Enable or disable checks for completing zone quests

options.name: wayshrine_checks_enabled
options.description: Enable or disable checks for finding Wayshrine

options.name: delves_per_region
options.description: Maximum number of dungeons selected from each unlocked region

options.name: gold_cap
options.description: What you want your starting gold cap to be without any items, set to 0 to turn off gold limiting

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Shrine of the Black Maw Access

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Shrine of the Black Maw Access

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Shrine of the Black Maw Access

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Shrine of the Black Maw Access

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
